profile.about: Currently a Senior Operations Analyst at Etsy, I develop ML models, ETL pipelines, and evaluate new experimentation frameworks for LLM-powered launches. I hold a dual MS from Cornell and a BSE from Princeton, and have previously worked in data science at Square and CKM Analytix. My work sits at the intersection of applied ML, experimentation, and business analytics, with a recent focus on conversational AI systems and how to evaluate them.
